title: First Words Out Loud
description: Your first pronunciation lesson. Record each phrase and the AI will score your pronunciation 0–100. Don't be shy — Cosmo is listening.
summary_pt_br: Primeira aula de pronúncia. O estudante grava a frase no navegador, a IA (Groq Whisper) transcreve e compara com o alvo, dando uma nota de 0 a 100. Cinco frases essenciais do dia a dia.

scenes.text_en:
Mr. Kumar smiled at the microphone.
'Hit RECORD. Say the phrase clearly. The AI will listen and give you a score.
Don't be shy — you can try again as many times as you want.'
scenes.text_pt:
Mr. Kumar sorriu pro microfone.
'Aperte RECORD. Diga a frase com clareza. A IA vai ouvir e dar uma nota.
Sem vergonha — pode tentar de novo quantas vezes quiser.'

scenes.text_en:
Five phrases. Five scores. If you got 70+ on any of them — that's a pass.
If you scored lower, don't worry. Practice the TH and the R, and come back.
scenes.text_pt:
Cinco frases. Cinco notas. 70 ou mais = passou.
Se pegou menos, sem estresse. Pratica o TH e o R, e volta.

scenes.title: Pronunciation diagnostic
scenes.pt_summary: Diagnóstico de pronúncia — frases curtas e diagnósticas.

turns.speaker: ai
turns.text: Hi! I want to hear your English. Ready?
turns.pt: Oi! Quero ouvir seu inglês. Pronto?

turns.speaker: user
turns.target: Yes, I am ready to start.

turns.speaker: ai
turns.text: Great. Repeat after me — Hello, how are you?
turns.pt: Ótimo. Repete depois de mim — Hello, how are you?

turns.speaker: ai
turns.text: Nice. Now — Thank you very much.
turns.pt: Bom. Agora — Thank you very much.

turns.speaker: ai
turns.text: Good. Try — I am a student from Brazil.
turns.pt: Tenta — I am a student from Brazil.

turns.speaker: user
turns.target: I am a student from Brazil.
turns.pt_hint: I am a student from Brazil.

turns.speaker: ai
turns.text: Excellent. One more — Nice to meet you.
turns.pt: Excelente. Mais uma — Nice to meet you.

turns.speaker: ai
turns.text: You did great. Let's keep practicing!

scenes.title: Recap reading
scenes.passage_en: At Amazing School, the class just finished "First Words Out Loud". Your first pronunciation lesson. Record each phrase and the AI will score your pronunciation 0–100. Don't be shy — Cosmo is listening. Mr. Kumar reminded the students that practice is the key — listen, read aloud, write your own examples. Every small step adds up. The ocean in Praia do Sol keeps moving, and so does your English.

check.question: According to Mr. Kumar, what is the key to learning?
check.explanation: Practice — listen, read aloud, write your own examples.
check.hint_pt_br: A chave é a prática: ouvir, ler em voz alta, escrever seus próprios exemplos.

scenes.title: Listen to Bia
scenes.audio_text_en: Hello! I'm Bia, from Praia do Sol. Today in class we studied "First Words Out Loud". I liked it because it was clear and short. Tomorrow we will practice again. See you then!

check.question: What did Bia study today?
options: A grammar rule about the past
check.explanation: She says: "Today in class we studied 'First Words Out Loud'".
check.hint_pt_br: Ela fala claramente o título: "First Words Out Loud".

scenes.title: Go deeper — free resources
scenes.body_pt: Fontes gratuitas e confiáveis para você estudar mais. Salve os links e volte sempre.

sources.label: British Council · A1
sources.pt_hint: Diálogos A1 do British Council, com áudio.

sources.label: BBC Learning English · Beginners
sources.pt_hint: Curso gratuito da BBC, nível iniciante.
